# snapcd_agent_module_assignment (Resource)

Manages an Agent Module Assignment in Snap CD. Permits the Module to select this Agent for missions.




<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) ID of the Agent that is assigned to the Module.
- `module_id` (String) ID of the Module to which the Agent is assigned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the Agent Module Assignment.
